content:
graph TD
    subgraph StrategyWorkshopping
        CouncilDebate[Debate]
        CouncilChallenge[Challenge]
        CouncilSynthesize[Synthesize]
        InteractionLog[Logged Interactions]
        AuditReasoning[Audit Reasoning]
        ComplianceCheck[Compliance Check]
        AccountabilityTrack[Accountability Track]
    end
    subgraph PromptOptimization
        OptimizeAnything[Optimize Anything]
        SkillBanks[Skill Banks]
        RefinePrompts[Refine Prompts]
        RefinePolicies[Refine Policies]
        RefineRoles[Refine Roles]
        MultiAgentEnsemble[Multi-Agent Ensemble]
    end
    subgraph ExplainableAI
        SemanticProofLog[Semantic Proof Log]
        PlanFormatter[Plan Formatter]
        TransparencyDecisions[Transparency for Decisions]
        UIWhy[Web UI]
    end
    CouncilDebate --> CouncilChallenge
    CouncilChallenge --> CouncilSynthesize
    CouncilSynthesize --> InteractionLog
    InteractionLog --> AuditReasoning
    InteractionLog --> ComplianceCheck
    InteractionLog --> AccountabilityTrack
    OptimizeAnything --> SkillBanks
    SkillBanks --> RefinePrompts
    SkillBanks --> RefinePolicies
    SkillBanks --> RefineRoles
    RefinePrompts --> MultiAgentEnsemble
    RefinePolicies --> MultiAgentEnsemble
    RefineRoles --> MultiAgentEnsemble
    SemanticProofLog --> TransparencyDecisions
    PlanFormatter --> TransparencyDecisions
    TransparencyDecisions --> UIWhy
title: EXECUTION BLUEPRINT
